claim_boundary: negative fixture for cyclic order-four substitution; not a complexity-theoretic claim

rejection_reason.summary: The cyclic order-four table is Latin but is not an admissible orthogonal mate for the readout-basis doctrine.
rejection_reason.required_structure: V4 / additive GF(4), not cyclic Z/4

nonclaim: This fixture only rejects a false algebraic substitution. It does not establish a lower bound or prove a Clay-relevant result.
